# Roman Peschke

> Free step-by-step AI tool guides. Each guide walks through a specific workflow with exact tools, steps, and links.

Roman Peschke creates daily Instagram Reels breaking down AI tools and workflows for building, automating, and scaling businesses. Each guide on this site is a companion to a video, giving you the exact steps to follow along.

## Guides

- [15 Ways to Stop Burning Claude Code Tokens](/guides/claude-code-tokens/): Cut token usage by 10-30x. Session management, context control, prompt efficiency, model matching, and CLAUDE.md optimization.
- [How to Build a Website with Google Stitch and Antigravity](/guides/build-website-stitch/): Design a website with AI in Google Stitch, pull code into Antigravity via MCP, deploy on Vercel. Free, no code.
- [How to Set Up Computer Use in Claude Code](/guides/claude-code-computer-use/): Enable Claude to control your desktop, set up channels to talk from your phone, and create scheduled tasks for autopilot. macOS, Pro/Max plan required.
- [How to Set Up iMessage for Claude Code](/guides/claude-code-imessage/): Text yourself to talk to Claude Code. No bots, no tokens. Reads your Messages database directly. macOS only, requires Bun.
- [How to Try UNI-1 by Luma Labs](/guides/uni-1-luma-labs/): Reasoning-based AI image generation. Free to try, reference-guided generation, ranked #1 in human preference. Light comparison to Nano Banana 2.
- [How to Turn Sales Call Transcripts Into Ad Copy with AI](/guides/sales-call-ad-copy/): Connect GoHighLevel to Claude Code. Automatically extract pain points, objections, and buying signals from call transcripts. Build a segmented ad copy bank.
- [How to Enable AI Studio in GoHighLevel](/guides/ghl-ai-studio/): GHL's built-in vibe coding tool. Build websites, funnels, and apps by describing what you want. Clone any site from a URL. Free during Labs.
- [How to Install Superpowers for Claude Code](/guides/superpowers-claude-code/): Free plugin that turns your coding agent into an autonomous dev team. Brainstorming, design docs, sub-agent dispatch, TDD, and code review. Works on Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode.
- [How to Get OpenAI Codex Inside Your Claude Code Session](/guides/codex-inside-claude-code/): Install the official Codex plugin for Claude Code. Code reviews, adversarial challenges, and task handoff from a second AI agent without leaving your workflow.
- [How to Make Videos with Remotion and Claude Code](/guides/make-videos-remotion/): Scaffold a React video project, prompt what you want, render real MP4s. Use cases: social content, product demos, data visualizations, ecommerce ads, personalized campaigns.
- [How to Automate Your Business with Claude Code Routines](/guides/claude-code-routines-for-business/): Turn any local workflow into a cloud routine that runs on a schedule, webhook, or GitHub event. Non-technical walkthrough driven by Claude Code prompts.

## Links

- Instagram: https://instagram.com/roman.peschke
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/channel/UCKCFX_RcAJwNK7bqZd069iQ
